data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: While the linked use case mentions dietary restrictions being noted and venues notified, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates how the system tracks these restrictions across multiple stops. The exploratory step requires specific API reads and persisted state checks to confirm this functionality, which are absent in the evidence. Therefore, a gap exists in the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks for dietary/restriction tracking across stops.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
